issue.message: The Google Play store has a policy that limits usage of MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Attribute `dataExtractionRules` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 30)
A newer version of androidx.core:core than 1.12.0 is available: 1.17.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity than 1.8.1 is available: 1.12.4
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2024.02.00 is available: 2026.02.01

A newer version of androidx.test:runner than 1.5.2 is available: 1.7.0
A newer version of androidx.test:rules than 1.5.0 is available: 1.7.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2024.02.00 is available: 2026.02.01
A newer version of androidx.room:room-testing than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-testing than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
The attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` only applies for Android 12 and higher; since `minSdkVersion` is API 30 you should also set `android:fullBackupContent`

Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
